title: T-SQL | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# T-SQL

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/t-sql/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update the T-SQL-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") in the project **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **T-SQL**.

## [Important Note](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/t-sql/#important-note "Important Note")

With the default configuration, only files with the `.tsql` are analyzed as T-SQL, and files with the `.sql` file extension are analyzed as PL/SQL. This behavior is defined in Project **Administration** > **General Settings > T-SQL > File Suffixes** and *Your Project* > **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **PL/SQL** > **File Suffixes**. You can override these properties at the project level.
